description: This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Alurmi. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Formula: Enchant Ring - Spellpower

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Ring - Spellpower Phase 1 Item Level 72 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (360) Requires Keepers of Time - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a ring to increase spell damage and healing by up to 12. Permanently enchant a ring to increase spell damage and healing by up to 12. Only the Enchanter's rings can be enchanted, and enchanting a ring will cause it to become soulbound. Sell Price: 2 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Alurmi. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
